The '''Mostlaa''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Individuals of the species had heavy brows, sunken [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and large, pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. The Mostlaa named [[Jimmer]] had a receding hairline and a beard, creating an overall [[Weasel/Legends|weasel]]-like impression. Jimmer stood 1.3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and wore a hooded, long-sleeved [[Robe/Legends|robe]], a wrap around the waist, and [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. Jimmer worked as an [[executive assistant]] for [[Nilya Fek'ra]], a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cotellier/Legends|Cotellier]] during the period of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TSB" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Bill Smith]] created the Mostlaa species for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying]] adventure "[[Tales of the Smoking Blaster]]," published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]] as part of the ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''. Jimmer, the Mostlaa, was illustrated by [[Paul Daly]].<ref name="TSB" />
